title: ころんってしたいのー

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Big Bro. Why don't we just laze around on
the couch today?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Big Sis. Why don't we just laze around on
the couch today?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I wanna hang out with you... C'mon...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I wanna hang out with you... C'mon...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan seems more drowsy than motivated
today.
